creator: tj+freebsd_ports@a13.fr
text:
I think it was fixed by:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/databases/ruby-bdb/Makefile?r1=431392&r2=431391&pathrev=431392
with addition of post-install-DOCS-on and post-install-EXAMPLES-on.

If I remove those targets I get the original errors reported, but with
actual ports after this fix, poudriere does not report any issue with
one of those options off, or both.
